title: Quest Panini Press and Grill Sandwich Maker/Compact Stainless Steel Design/Non-Stick Hotplates/Cool Touch Floating Hinge Handle/Automatic Temperature Control
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: COMPACT PANINI PRESS AND GRILL – This stainless-steel compact panini press and grill is ideal for cooking meat, fish and more as well as paninis and toasties. As there is little to no need for oil, it is a healthy way to cook your favourite meals.

AUTOMATIC TEMPERATURE CONTROL – The automatic temperature control allows you to achieve the perfect level of cooking, depending on your choice of food. The ready light indicator lets you know when your food is ready.

NON-STICK PLATES – The non-stick coated plates make the grill easy to keep clean. Its floating hinge system means that the top and bottom plates are heated so the lid can float above thicker food types to ensure your food is evenly cooked.
EASY TO USE AND STORE – A cool touch handle and non-slip feet will ensure your comfort and safety when the grill is in use. The grill also locks shut and has a cord wrap for compact storage.
QUEST APPLIANCES – With a wide range of home appliances like steam irons, hoovers & student essential cooking appliances, you’re sure to find exactly what you need at the Quest Amazon store.
description: Product Description Great for Sandwiches, Paninis & More Compact Grill & Press This compact Grill & Panini Press is ideal for cooking a large variety of foods. Featuring fast heating, non-stick plates, the grill makes cooking paninis, toasties, and other foods easy, with minimal effort needed to clean afterwards. The lid is balanced on a floating hinge system for greater flexibility, and can also safely lock in place for easy storage afterwards. Previous page Safe Easy Use The grill features an indicator light, anti-slip feet, and a cool touch handle for the upper lid. Floating Hinge System The floating hinge system ensures your food is evenly cooked on both sides, useful for paninis. Auto Temperature Control The grill's automatic temperature control helps you to cook perfectly with a helpful ready light. Compact Design The grill folds flat with a lid that locks shut, making it easy to store away after use. Non-Stick Plates The non-stick coated plates make the grill easy to clean, while eliminating the need for oils/fats. Next page 1 Safe Easy Use 2 Floating Hinge System 3 Auto Temperature Control 4 Compact Design 5 Non-Stick Plates

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Cool Touch, Easy to Store, Floating Wide Hinge, Non Slip Feet, Non Stick Coating
